AI.tldr: 通过STM研究错配层状化合物(MS)₁₊δTaS₂，发现其电荷密度波(CDW)在错配界面产生的莫尔势作用下变得非公度且各向异性，而超导性则相对不受影响。
AI.motivation: 研究错配层状化合物中不同晶格对称性堆叠如何影响集体电子相，特别是探索非公度性和显式对称性破缺对电荷密度波和超导性的影响。
AI.method: 使用低温扫描隧道显微镜/谱学(STM/STS)研究(MS)₁₊δTaS₂ (M = Pb, Sn)化合物，结合高分辨率STM成像、傅里叶分析以及第一性原理启发的多尺度建模。
AI.result: CDW变得非公度并分裂成纳米尺寸的畴，在错配层施加的单轴莫尔势作用下表现出显著各向异性响应：相干长度和有序波矢变得不等价。超导性相对不受莫尔势影响，表现出均匀的单一全隙，符合s波配对。
AI.conclusion: 异对称性堆叠是调控范德华材料中关联态的有效途径，CDW与莫尔势之间存在强非线性耦合，而超导性对莫尔势相对不敏感。

title: Unifying description of competing chiral and nematic superconducting states in twisted bilayer graphene
comment: 18 pages, 10 figures (main text); 9 pages, 5 figures (supplemental material)
summary: We reveal a striking correspondence between electron- and phonon-driven pairing in twisted bilayer graphene (TBG) by mapping an atomistic electronically driven pairing model onto an effective inter-valley, intra-Chern description, originally proposed for phonon-mediated superconductivity. Within the unified framework of intra-Chern pairing, we analyze the competition between nematic and chiral superconducting states. The latter corresponds to the extreme Chern-polarized limit and thus hosts unpaired flat bands within the superconducting gap, which generally disfavors it relative to the nematic states. Crucially, nematic order is locally preferred at each momenta, but the optimal nematic directions are incompatible across the Brillouin zone due to the broken rotation symmetry. This momentum-space frustration enables a chiral ground state at large fillings or weak interactions. Our results thereby both provide a unified understanding of superconductivity in TBG, with a natural cooperation of electron- and phonon-mediated pairing, and clarify the microscopic origin of the competition between the chiral and nematic superconducting states.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了魔角双层石墨烯中电子驱动和声子驱动配对的对应关系，在统一的框架下分析了向列相和手性超导态的竞争机制。
AI.motivation: 魔角双层石墨烯中的超导机制存在争议，需要统一理解电子驱动和声子驱动配对的关系，并阐明手性和向列相超导态竞争的微观起源。
AI.method: 通过将原子尺度的电子驱动配对模型映射到有效的谷间、陈数内描述框架，该框架最初是为声子介导的超导提出的。在统一的陈数内配对框架下分析向列相和手性超导态的竞争。
AI.result: 发现手性态对应极端陈数极化极限，其超导能隙内存在未配对的平带，因此通常不如向列相态有利。向列相序在每个动量点局部优选，但由于旋转对称性破缺，布里渊区不同区域的优选方向不兼容，这种动量空间挫败使得在大填充或弱相互作用下出现手性基态。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为魔角双层石墨烯中的超导性提供了统一理解，表明电子和声子介导配对自然合作，并阐明了手性和向列相超导态竞争的微观机制。

title: Magnetoelastic signatures of thermal and quantum phase transitions in a deformable Ising chain under a longitudinal and transverse magnetic field
summary: We investigate a deformable spin-1/2 Ising chain subjected to either a longitudinal or a transverse magnetic field, which incorporates a magnetoelastic coupling linearly dependent on a lattice distortion parameter. Within the harmonic and static adiabatic approximations, the variational Gibbs free energy is evaluated exactly using transfer-matrix and Jordan-Wigner fermionization techniques and then minimized self-consistently with respect to the lattice distortion parameter. This approach enables a unified description of magnetic and elastic properties including the magnetization, magnetic susceptibility, lattice distortion, inverse compressibility, and relative change in the sound velocity. In a longitudinal magnetic field, the deformable Ising chain displays a line of discontinuous thermal phase transitions terminating at a critical point. The discontinuous transitions are accompanied by metastable states, which give rise to a hysteresis loop at low temperatures. In contrast, the deformable Ising chain in a transverse field undergoes exclusively a continuous quantum phase transition at zero temperature with no indication of thermal phase transitions. The magnetic susceptibility and inverse compressibility exhibit cusp- and dip-like anomalies at discontinuous phase transitions, while a diverging susceptibility and vanishing inverse compressibility characterize the continuous phase transitions. An elastic softening of the deformable chain near thermal and quantum phase transitions manifest itself also through a significant sound attenuation.

AI.tldr: 可变形自旋-1/2伊辛链在纵向或横向磁场中的磁弹耦合研究，揭示了热相变和量子相变的不同行为
AI.motivation: 研究磁弹耦合对可变形伊辛链在磁场中相变行为的影响，统一描述磁性和弹性性质
AI.method: 采用谐波和静态绝热近似，通过转移矩阵和Jordan-Wigner费米子化技术精确计算变分吉布斯自由能，并自洽地最小化晶格畸变参数
AI.result: 纵向磁场中观察到不连续热相变线终止于临界点，伴随滞后现象；横向磁场中仅发生连续量子相变；磁化率和逆压缩率在相变点显示不同异常行为
AI.conclusion: 磁弹耦合导致可变形伊辛链在不同磁场中表现出截然不同的相变行为，弹性软化在热相变和量子相变附近都导致显著声衰减

title: Partial Information Decomposition of Electronic Observables Along a Reaction Coordinate
comment: Supplementary document to the talk given by the authors in 2026 DPG Conference, Dresden, Germany, Session CPP 29: Emerging Topics in Chemical and Polymer Physics, New Instruments and Methods III
summary: A reaction-coordinate--resolved information-theoretic analysis of chemical reactivity is developed using mutual information and partial information decomposition (PID). Along an intrinsic reaction coordinate (IRC), a local empirical distribution is constructed at each position $s$ that couples a coarse-grained geometric progress variable (target) to two electronic readouts (sources), and the joint mutual information $I(T;X,Y)$ is decomposed into redundant, unique, and synergistic contributions using the Williams--Beer PID formalism. In the numerical demonstrations, the target is a binned bond-asymmetry coordinate $ξ=d_{\mathrm{C}\!-\!\mathrm{nuc}}-d_{\mathrm{C}\!-\!\mathrm{LG}}$, while the sources are DDEC6 net atomic charges on the nucleophile and leaving-group centres. Application to three prototypical S$_\mathrm{N}$2 reactions (identity exchange $\mathrm{F^-+CH_3F}$, halide substitution $\mathrm{F^-+CH_3Br}$, and hydroxide substitution $\mathrm{OH^-+CH_3CH_2Br}$) yields compact, symmetry-sensitive signatures of bonding evolution: the identity reaction exhibits mirror-related information profiles with exchange of unique-information contributions between equivalent centres, whereas asymmetric reactions show shifted, centre-specific redistribution among redundancy and synergy as C--X cleavage couples to C--Nu formation. This Supplementary Information provides the formal construction, chemically motivated limiting toy models, a solvable analytic symmetric-transfer model, and the computational protocol used to obtain IRC-resolved PID curves.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一种基于反应坐标的信息论分析方法，使用互信息和部分信息分解来研究化学反应性，应用于SN2反应体系。
AI.motivation: 传统反应性描述缺乏对电子结构变化与几何变化之间信息传递的定量分析，需要发展能够解析反应过程中信息流动的框架。
AI.method: 沿内禀反应坐标构建局部经验分布，将几何进展变量作为目标，两个电子读数作为源，使用Williams-Beer PID形式分解联合互信息为冗余、独特和协同贡献。
AI.result: 应用于三种典型SN2反应，获得了紧凑、对称敏感的键合演化特征：对称反应显示镜像信息分布，不对称反应显示中心特异性冗余和协同贡献的重新分布。
AI.conclusion: 反应坐标解析的信息论分析为化学键合演化提供了新的定量视角，能够捕捉对称性和电子结构变化的细微特征。

title: Tight-Binding Device Modeling of 2-D Topological Insulator Field-Effect Transistors With Gate-Induced Phase Transition
summary: Topological insulator field-effect transistors (TIFETs) built on 2-D quantum spin Hall insulators are being considered as advanced logic transistors due to their potentially superior performance originating from the dissipationless edge transport. This paper presents a device modeling based on the tight-binding model and the nonequilibrium Green's function formalism to simulate the current-voltage characteristics of the TIFETs. We then use the device simulator to demonstrate the effect of channel length on device performance. The device modeling will not only enable a direct estimation of TIFET performance but also shed light on the nontraditional switching operation via the topological phase transition.

AI.tldr: 基于拓扑绝缘体场效应晶体管（TIFETs）的器件建模研究，通过紧束缚模型和非平衡格林函数模拟电流-电压特性，分析沟道长度对性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 二维量子自旋霍尔绝缘体构建的TIFETs因其无耗散边缘输运特性具有潜在优越性能，需要建立器件模型来评估其性能并理解拓扑相变带来的非传统开关操作机制。
AI.method: 采用紧束缚模型和非平衡格林函数形式主义进行器件建模，模拟TIFETs的电流-电压特性，并利用该器件模拟器研究沟道长度对器件性能的影响。
AI.result: 建立了能够直接评估TIFET性能的器件模拟器，揭示了沟道长度对器件性能的具体影响，并阐明了通过拓扑相变实现非传统开关操作的机制。
AI.conclusion: 该器件建模方法不仅能够直接估算TIFET性能，还为理解基于拓扑相变的非传统开关操作提供了重要见解，有助于推动拓扑绝缘体场效应晶体管的发展。

title: Validation of constant mean free path and relaxation time approximations for metal resistivity: explicit treatment of electron-phonon interactions
summary: The figure of merit $ρλ$ the product of resistivity and mean free path (MFP) evaluated from first-principles calculations, is widely adopted to screen promising interconnect metals with high electrical conductivity at ultranarrow dimensions. However, the $ρλ$ has been calculated without addressing the validity of the assumption that the MFP is independent of the wavevector $\mathbf{k}$. Here, we assess the validity of the constant MFP approximation, by estimating the $\mathbf{k}$-dependent MFPs for (an)isotropic elemental metals, with explicit treatment of electron-phonon interactions. Additionally, we verify the validity of the constant relaxation time approximation (CRTA) for resistivity calculations. We show that both the constant MFP approximation and CRTA are reasonable even for highly anisotropic Fermi surfaces. Our results support the practical use of those approximations in transport studies, where explicit electron-phonon calculations are not feasible.

AI.tldr: 评估常数平均自由程近似和常数弛豫时间近似在计算金属电阻率时的有效性，验证这些近似在传输研究中的实用性。
AI.motivation: 虽然ρλ（电阻率与平均自由程的乘积）被广泛用于筛选超窄尺寸下高电导率的互连金属，但之前计算时假设平均自由程与波矢k无关，这一假设的有效性尚未得到验证。
AI.method: 通过第一性原理计算，考虑电子-声子相互作用，估计各向同性/各向异性元素金属的k依赖平均自由程，并验证常数弛豫时间近似在电阻率计算中的有效性。
AI.result: 研究表明，即使对于高度各向异性的费米面，常数平均自由程近似和常数弛豫时间近似都是合理的。
AI.conclusion: 这些近似在传输研究中是实用的，特别是在无法进行显式电子-声子计算的情况下，支持了这些近似方法的继续使用。

title: AKLT Hamiltonian from Hubbard tripods
summary: We investigate how the spin-1 Affleck-Kennedy-Lieb-Tasaki (AKLT) Hamiltonian can emerge from a microscopic fermionic model based on half-filled Hubbard tripods. We first show that a single tripod hosts a robust threefold-degenerate low-energy manifold corresponding to an effective $S = 1$ degree of freedom. This manifold prevails over a broad range of interactions and remains stable against moderate disorder. We then combine exact diagonalization with fourth-order quasi-degenerate perturbation theory to derive an effective bilinear-biquadratic spin model for a pair of coupled tripods and identify coupling regimes where the target ratio is approached. In particular, tuning leg-center hopping together with two symmetry-inequivalent leg-leg hoppings yields the characteristic singlet-triplet degeneracy associated with a biquadratic-to-bilinear ratio close to 1/3. Extending the analysis to three tripods, we compare nonequivalent coupling geometries and find a strategy that suppresses unwanted longer-range and multispin terms while preserving the target nearest-neighbor couplings in the weak-coupling regime. These results establish a concrete bottom-up route from Hubbard clusters to valence-bond-solid spin physics in tunable quantum-dot arrays.

AI.tldr: 从半填充Hubbard三脚架微观模型出发，推导出spin-1 AKLT哈密顿量的具体实现路径
AI.motivation: 探索如何从微观费米子模型（Hubbard三脚架）中涌现出spin-1 AKLT哈密顿量，为可调量子点阵列中的价键固体自旋物理提供具体实现方案
AI.method: 1. 单个三脚架分析：展示其低能三度简并态对应有效S=1自旋；2. 耦合三脚架对：结合精确对角化和四阶准简并微扰理论推导有效双线性-双二次自旋模型；3. 三脚架系统：比较不同耦合几何结构，寻找抑制非目标项的策略
AI.result: 1. 单个三脚架在宽相互作用范围内保持稳定的S=1低能流形；2. 调节腿-中心跃迁和两种对称不等价腿-腿跃迁可获得接近目标比1/3的双二次-双线性比；3. 找到抑制长程和多自旋项的策略，在弱耦合区保持目标最近邻耦合
AI.conclusion: 建立了从Hubbard团簇到价键固体自旋物理的具体自下而上实现路径，为可调量子点阵列中的AKLT物理提供了理论基础

title: Mean-Field Convective Phase Separation under Thermal Gradients
summary: Nonequilibrium conditions fundamentally change how systems undergo phase separation. In systems with temperature gradients, attractive particles have been shown to form periodic patterns and steady convective currents, but a clear theoretical explanation for this behavior is still missing. Here, we present a dynamical mean-field model that describes the mechanism behind this convective phase separation. Using linear stability analysis, we show that the transition from a uniform state to a periodic pattern is driven by the emergence of a dominant unstable mode. Numerical simulations confirm the predicted phase diagram and demonstrate that these convective currents are a robust feature of the steady state, appearing regardless of the initial conditions. These results provide a direct approach for understanding how temperature gradients drive the formation of steady-state convective patterns.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个动力学平均场模型来解释温度梯度下吸引粒子系统如何形成周期性对流模式，揭示了从均匀态到周期性模式的转变机制。
AI.motivation: 在温度梯度系统中，吸引粒子会形成周期性模式和稳态对流，但缺乏明确的理论解释。需要建立理论框架来理解温度梯度如何驱动这种对流相分离现象。
AI.method: 提出了一个动力学平均场模型，通过线性稳定性分析研究从均匀态到周期性模式的转变，并用数值模拟验证预测的相图。
AI.result: 线性稳定性分析显示转变由主导不稳定模式驱动，数值模拟证实了预测的相图，表明对流电流是稳态的鲁棒特征，与初始条件无关。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为理解温度梯度如何驱动稳态对流模式的形成提供了直接的理论方法，解释了非平衡条件下对流相分离的机制。

title: Real-Time Electron-Electron Scattering Dynamics in Plasmonic Nanostructures
summary: Electron-electron scattering is one of the most important hot carrier relaxation pathways in plasmonic nanoparticles. Understanding the dynamics of this scattering process and the effects of this on excited state dephasing and relaxation is therefore essential for the design of plasmonic nanostructures, including optical properties and the dynamics of electrons in plasmon-driven catalytic reactions. In this work, we have developed a novel approach that incorporates real-time time-dependent density functional tight-binding (DFTB) simulations with the Lindblad quantum Boltzmann equation (LQBE) based on a screened electron-electron interaction that is determined by the random phase approximation (RPA). This approach enables a self-consistent description of electron-electron scattering effects that occur during and after plasmon excitation in clusters/nanoparticles with hundreds of atoms. With our RT-TDDFTB+LQBE method, we investigate the quasiparticle lifetime as well as population and coherence dynamics in silver, gold and aluminum nanoclusters with sizes between 1.5-2.6 nm. Our results show that the quasiparticle lifetimes and relaxation dynamics are highly energy dependent, becoming much faster at higher energies. For clusters less than 2 nm, quantum effects associated with discrete energy levels can lead to the fluctuating lifetimes and deviation of the dynamics from the typical thermalization process, while for larger nanoparticles, the transition to bulk metallic behavior is found. Decoherence of the initially excited plasmon resonance is observed with a timescale of 10 fs, much faster than population relaxation. For gold, we find that the 5d-band can significantly slow down the relaxation of energetic electrons though Auger scattering, and interband transitions can lead to a secondary decoherence process longer than 50 fs.

AI.tldr: 开发了结合实时TDDFTB与Lindblad量子玻尔兹曼方程的新方法，研究银、金、铝纳米团簇中电子-电子散射对等离激元弛豫的影响，发现准粒子寿命具有能量依赖性，小团簇存在量子效应，金中5d带会减缓电子弛豫。
AI.motivation: 电子-电子散射是等离激元纳米粒子中最重要的热载流子弛豫途径之一。理解这一散射过程的动力学及其对激发态退相干和弛豫的影响，对于设计等离激元纳米结构（包括光学性质和等离激元驱动催化反应中的电子动力学）至关重要。
AI.method: 开发了一种新方法，将实时时间依赖密度泛函紧束缚（RT-TDDFTB）模拟与基于随机相位近似（RPA）确定的屏蔽电子-电子相互作用的Lindblad量子玻尔兹曼方程（LQBE）相结合。这种方法能够自洽地描述在数百个原子的团簇/纳米粒子中等离激元激发期间和之后发生的电子-电子散射效应。
AI.result: 研究了银、金和铝纳米团簇（尺寸1.5-2.6 nm）中的准粒子寿命以及布居和相干动力学。结果表明准粒子寿命和弛豫动力学高度依赖于能量，在较高能量下变得更快。对于小于2 nm的团簇，与离散能级相关的量子效应会导致寿命波动和动力学偏离典型的热化过程，而对于较大的纳米粒子，则观察到向体相金属行为的转变。初始激发的等离激元共振的退相干时间尺度为10 fs，比布居弛豫快得多。对于金，发现5d带可以通过俄歇散射显著减缓高能电子的弛豫，带间跃迁可导致超过50 fs的二次退相干过程。
AI.conclusion: 所开发的RT-TDDFTB+LQBE方法能够自洽地描述纳米团簇中等离激元激发期间的电子-电子散射效应，揭示了准粒子寿命的能量依赖性、小尺寸团簇的量子效应以及金中5d带对电子弛豫的减缓作用，为等离激元纳米结构的设计提供了重要理论指导。

title: Phase-resolved imaging of coherent phonon-magnon coupling
summary: We use a direct phase-resolved optical technique to study the coherence of spin waves (SWs) that are driven by surface acoustic waves (SAWs) via resonant magnetoelastic coupling. For this, we employ a piezoelectric lithium tantalate (LiTaO$_{3}$) substrate, equipped with micropatterned interdigital transducers for SAW excitation, which interact with SWs in a 5 nm thin and 20 $μ$m wide Co$_{40}$Fe$_{40}$B$_{20}$-waveguide. We detect the SAW and the SW using a phase-locked micro-focused optical polarization detection experiment and use the characteristic polarization dependence to separate the SAW and SW signals. Our measurements directly image the resonant and coherent excitation of the SW by the SAW.

AI.tldr: 使用相位分辨光学技术研究表面声波通过磁弹性耦合驱动的自旋波相干性
AI.motivation: 研究表面声波通过共振磁弹性耦合驱动自旋波的相干特性，需要直接观测和分离SAW和SW信号
AI.method: 采用压电钽酸锂衬底和微图案叉指换能器激发SAW，通过相位锁定的微聚焦光学偏振检测实验分离SAW和SW信号
AI.result: 直接成像了SAW对SW的共振和相干激发，成功分离了SAW和SW信号
AI.conclusion: 相位分辨光学技术能够有效研究SAW驱动的SW相干性，为磁声耦合研究提供了新方法

title: Tracing the film structure of an organic semiconductor with photoemission orbital tomography
summary: Photoemission orbital tomography (POT) is a powerful tool for investigating the orbitals and electronic band structure of oriented layers of organic molecules. In many cases, POT allows conclusions to be drawn regarding the geometric structure, but so far it has been mainly applied to (sub)monolayers and rarely to bilayers, raising the question of whether POT can also provide structure information for thicker films. Here, we use POT to analyze the band dispersion in up to eight layers of $α$-sexithiophene (6T) adsorbed on Cu(110)-p($2\times1$)O. This linear oligomer turns out to be a textbook example that exemplifies the concepts of intra- and intermolecular band dispersion in molecules. Moreover, the rich band and orbital structure information available from POT for this system enables us to trace subtle changes in the crystal structure as a function of layer thickness. Specifically, we find that the periodicity of an intermolecular band changes with film thickness, revealing an increase of the intralayer distance between the molecules with the number of layers. At the same time, the momentum distribution of photoemission from the highest occupied molecular orbital of 6T discloses a decrease of the molecular tilt angle. Following the evolution of tilt angle and lattice constant with layer thickness, we observe -- purely based on electronic structure data -- that the surface-templated monolayer structure relaxes into the structure of bulk 6T crystals. The experimental findings agree well with the results of density functional theory calculations.

AI.tldr: POT成功应用于8层α-六噻吩薄膜，揭示了分子轨道、能带色散随层厚变化，以及从单层到体相结构的弛豫过程
AI.motivation: 探究光电子发射轨道层析技术能否应用于多层有机分子薄膜，获取结构信息，特别是α-六噻吩多层薄膜的电子结构和几何结构演化
AI.method: 使用光电子发射轨道层析技术分析Cu(110)-p(2×1)O衬底上1-8层α-六噻吩薄膜的能带色散和轨道结构，结合密度泛函理论计算验证
AI.result: 发现分子间能带周期随层厚变化，表明分子层内间距增加；最高占据分子轨道动量分布显示分子倾斜角减小；单层模板结构弛豫为体相晶体结构
AI.conclusion: POT技术可有效分析多层有机薄膜，α-六噻吩是研究分子内和分子间能带色散的理想体系，电子结构数据可追踪晶体结构随层厚的演化

title: Parity readout in Majorana box qubits from the dispersive to the resonant regime
summary: We study theoretical models for charge reflectometry and capacitive readout of the Majorana parity degree of freedom in Majorana box qubits, taking into account decoherence channels within the framework of the Lindblad master equation. Noting that a parity-dependent dynamical susceptibility $χ_z(ω)$ governs both readout schemes, we provide a general expression for $χ_z(ω)$ which covers the full crossover from the resonant regime to the off-resonant dispersive regime. In addition, we re-examine previous results which were obtained under a semiclassical factorization assumption. Using three different error measures, we show that this approximation is quantitatively justified in the dispersive regime. In the resonant regime, however, we find deviations from exact reference data, obtained by numerical solution for the steady state of the full Lindblad equation. These deviations are typically of the order of a few percent in the considered error measures.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了Majorana盒量子比特中电荷反射测量和电容读出的理论模型，考虑退相干通道，推导了奇偶性依赖的动态磁化率χ_z(ω)的通用表达式，并重新评估了半经典因子化近似的有效性。
AI.motivation: 研究Majorana盒量子比特中电荷反射测量和电容读出的理论模型，考虑退相干效应，旨在提供更精确的奇偶性读出理论框架，并验证半经典因子化近似在不同参数区域的适用性。
AI.method: 采用Lindblad主方程框架考虑退相干通道，推导奇偶性依赖的动态磁化率χ_z(ω)的通用表达式，覆盖从共振区到非共振色散区的完整过渡。通过数值求解完整Lindblad方程的稳态解作为精确参考，使用三种不同的误差度量评估半经典因子化近似的准确性。
AI.result: 在色散区，半经典因子化近似在定量上是合理的；但在共振区，发现与精确参考数据存在偏差，这些偏差在考虑的误差度量中通常约为百分之几。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为Majorana盒量子比特的奇偶性读出提供了更全面的理论框架，揭示了半经典因子化近似在不同参数区域的适用性限制，对实验设计和数据分析具有指导意义。

title: Lost in Translation: Simulation-Informed Bayesian Inference Improves Understanding of Molecular Motion From Neutron Scattering
summary: Quasi-elastic neutron scattering (QENS) probes atomic and molecular motion on length and time scales central to catalysis, energy materials, and gas adsorption. However, conventional analytical fitting of QENS spectra often fails to uniquely determine the underlying dynamics. The flexibility of simplified line-shape models can make spectra generated by distinct physical processes statistically indistinguishable, leading to ambiguous or inaccurate mechanistic interpretation. By integrating molecular dynamics simulations, physically derived $Q$-dependent scattering models, Bayesian model discrimination, and polarisation analysis, we demonstrate that QENS can, for the first time, resolve anisotropic rotational motion in liquid benzene, a prototypical aromatic molecule relevant to microporous catalysis. The extracted spinning and tumbling diffusion coefficients suggest substantially stronger anisotropy than previously recognised. This integrated, Bayesian evidence-based analytical framework defines a new paradigm for QENS, enabling direct resolution of the rotational and translational dynamics that govern molecular interactions and transport; the fundamental processes and rate-limiting steps in confined hydrocarbon catalysis.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种集成分子动力学模拟、贝叶斯模型判别和偏振分析的QENS分析新框架，首次解析了液态苯的各向异性旋转运动，揭示了比以往认知更强的各向异性。
AI.motivation: 传统QENS谱分析常因简化线形模型的灵活性而无法唯一确定底层动力学机制，导致对催化、能源材料等关键过程中分子运动的解释存在模糊或不准确。
AI.method: 集成分子动力学模拟、物理推导的Q依赖散射模型、贝叶斯模型判别和偏振分析，构建基于贝叶斯证据的分析框架。
AI.result: 首次解析了液态苯的各向异性旋转运动，提取的自旋和翻滚扩散系数显示比以往认知更强的各向异性。
AI.conclusion: 该集成贝叶斯证据分析框架为QENS定义了新范式，能够直接解析控制分子相互作用和输运的旋转与平移动力学，对受限烃类催化的基础过程和限速步骤研究具有重要意义。

title: Universal Dynamical Scaling of Strong-to-Weak Spontaneous Symmetry Breaking in Open Quantum Systems
summary: Strong-to-weak spontaneous symmetry breaking (SWSSB) defines a mixed-state phase of matter--without a pure-state counterpart--in which nonlinear observables such as the Rényi-2 correlator develop long-range order while conventional linear correlations remain short-ranged. Here we study the emergence of SWSSB in one-dimensional open quantum systems governed by Lindbladian evolution, where the transition time diverges with system size and SWSSB appears only asymptotically in the steady state. By tracking the late-time growth of the Rényi-2 correlation length, we uncover a universal dynamical regime controlled purely by the symmetry class of the Lindbladian. Contrary to the conventional expectation that late-time dynamics are governed by the low-lying Liouvillian spectrum, we find that the time dependence of the SWSSB transition--exponential versus algebraic--is dictated solely by symmetry, independent of details of the Lindbladian, including whether the Liouvillian spectrum is gapped or gapless. For $\mathbb{Z}_2$-symmetric dynamics, the Rényi-2 correlation length grows exponentially in time--even when the spectrum is gapless--yielding an effective transition time $t_c \propto \operatorname{ln} L$ and enabling rapid preparation of the $\mathbb{Z}_2$ SWSSB steady state. In contrast, U(1)-symmetric dynamics exhibit algebraic scaling, $t_c \propto L^α$, with a filling-dependent dynamical exponent: ballistic growth ($α\approx 1$) at finite filling crosses over to diffusive scaling ($α= 2$) in the zero-filling limit. These results establish symmetry--rather than spectral gap structure--as the controlling principle for SWSSB late-time dynamical scaling, and open a new route to nonequilibrium symmetry breaking in open quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 强到弱自发对称破缺(SWSSB)是一种混合态相，在开放量子系统中，其动力学标度由对称性而非谱隙结构决定。
AI.motivation: 研究开放量子系统中SWSSB相的出现，探索其动力学行为与对称性的关系，挑战传统认为低能Liouvillian谱决定动力学的观点。
AI.method: 通过追踪Rényi-2关联长度的晚期增长，分析一维Lindbladian演化系统的动力学标度行为，比较不同对称性(Z₂和U(1))下的时间依赖关系。
AI.result: 发现SWSSB转变的时间依赖关系完全由对称性决定：Z₂对称性下呈指数增长(t_c ∝ ln L)，U(1)对称性下呈代数标度(t_c ∝ L^α)，且α随填充变化。
AI.conclusion: 对称性而非谱隙结构是控制SWSSB晚期动力学标度的关键原则，为开放量子系统中的非平衡对称破缺提供了新途径。

title: Spin Inertia as a Source of Topological Magnons: Chiral Edge States from Coupled Precession and Nutation
summary: Spin inertia has been demonstrated to give rise to high-frequency nutational excitations beyond the conventional low-frequency precessional modes. Here, we demonstrate that the hybridization between precessional and nutational magnons may give rise to topological phenomena in the spin-wave spectrum. This hybridization requires the presence of interactions breaking angular-momentum conservation, such as the pseudodipolar interaction. We show on the example of a honeycomb ferromagnet how topological gaps open between the precessional and nutational bands that host chiral edge states in slab geometries. Our work establishes a theoretical foundation for exploring inertial spin dynamics as a new route to engineer topological phases in magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 论文展示了自旋惯性导致的进动和章动磁振子混合可产生拓扑现象，为磁性材料拓扑相工程提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 探索自旋惯性动力学作为在磁性材料中设计拓扑相的新途径，研究进动和章动磁振子混合产生的拓扑现象。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，研究需要破坏角动量守恒的相互作用（如赝偶极相互作用）来实现进动和章动磁振子的混合，并以蜂窝状铁磁体为例展示拓扑能隙和手性边缘态。
AI.result: 在进动和章动能带之间打开了拓扑能隙，这些能隙在板状几何结构中支持手性边缘态，建立了惯性自旋动力学作为拓扑相工程的理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 惯性自旋动力学为磁性材料中的拓扑相工程提供了新的理论途径，通过进动和章动磁振子的混合可实现拓扑现象。

title: Tomographic collective modes in a magnetic field
summary: Two-dimensional Fermi liquids at low temperatures have been theoretically established to exhibit an odd-even effect in the collective quasiparticle relaxation rates where even-parity deformations of the Fermi surface decay at a much faster rate than odd-parity ones. A predicted consequence of this effect is a new tomographic transport regime that mixes hydrodynamic and collisionless transport. In the presence of a magnetic field, however, the tomographic regime is expected to evolve towards conventional transport regimes as soon as the cyclotron radius becomes smaller than the dominant odd-parity mean free path. In this work, we examine this transition from the point of view of collective modes, using a numerically exact solution of the linearized Boltzmann equation within a generalized relaxation time approximation for the odd-parity and even-parity modes. In the absence of a magnetic field, the transverse conductivity exhibits two diffusive tomographic collective modes, and we find that at a critical magnetic field one of these two tomographic modes disappears. Which tomographic mode persists depends on the Landau parameters, with the remaining mode becoming increasingly dominated by hydrodynamic modes at high fields. We corroborate our analysis using a variational approach for the Fermi surface deformation that captures the angular structure of the deformation and the critical magnetic field strength. The collective modes discussed here can in principle be observed by examining the damping of longitudinal and transverse current responses in finite magnetic fields.

AI.tldr: 二维费米液体在低温下存在奇偶效应：偶宇称费米面形变衰减远快于奇宇称形变，导致新的层析输运机制。磁场会改变这一机制，当回旋半径小于奇宇称平均自由程时，层析输运会向常规输运转变。
AI.motivation: 研究磁场如何影响二维费米液体中的奇偶效应和层析输运机制，特别是从集体模式的角度理解从层析输运到常规输运的转变过程。
AI.method: 1. 在线性化玻尔兹曼方程框架内，采用广义弛豫时间近似，对奇偶宇称模式进行数值精确求解；2. 使用变分方法处理费米面形变，捕捉形变的角结构和临界磁场强度。
AI.result: 1. 无磁场时，横向电导率呈现两个扩散的层析集体模式；2. 在临界磁场下，其中一个层析模式消失；3. 哪个模式持续存在取决于朗道参数；4. 剩余模式在高磁场下越来越受流体力学模式主导；5. 变分方法验证了临界磁场强度的分析。
AI.conclusion: 磁场会改变二维费米液体中的奇偶效应输运机制，在临界磁场下发生从层析输运到常规输运的转变。这些集体模式可以通过测量有限磁场中纵向和横向电流响应的阻尼来观测。

title: On the interpretation of molecular photoexcitation with long and ultrashort laser pulses
summary: Photoexcitation is an inherent part of any photochemical or spectroscopic experiment, yet its impact on the excited-state dynamics is often overlooked. However, it is the excited molecular state, built upon photoexcitation and shaped by the characteristics of the light source, that determines the fate of the excited molecule and its subsequent photochemical reactions. In this work, we investigate how excited molecular states are built by different laser pulses, leveraging two representations of the molecular wave function: Born-Huang expansion and exact factorization. We explore the generation of two limiting cases: a stationary molecular state with a long laser pulse and an electronic wave packet by an ultrashort (attosecond) laser pulse. The standard concepts of population transfer between electronic states, resonance condition, or sudden vertical excitation, inherent to the Born-Huang representation and used by chemists to approximate the impact of photoexcitation on molecular systems, are challenged by the exact factorization.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨光激发对激发态动力学的影响，比较Born-Huang展开和精确因子化两种波函数表示方法，挑战传统光激发概念。
AI.motivation: 光激发是光化学和光谱实验的核心部分，但其对激发态动力学的影响常被忽视。激发分子态由光激发构建并受光源特性影响，决定了激发分子的命运和后续光化学反应。
AI.method: 使用两种分子波函数表示方法：Born-Huang展开和精确因子化，研究不同激光脉冲如何构建激发分子态。探索两种极限情况：长激光脉冲产生的稳态分子态和超短（阿秒）激光脉冲产生的电子波包。
AI.result: 精确因子化方法挑战了Born-Huang表示中化学家常用的标准概念，如电子态间的布居转移、共振条件或突然垂直激发，这些概念常被用来近似光激发对分子系统的影响。
AI.conclusion: 光激发对激发态动力学有重要影响，精确因子化方法提供了更准确的描述，挑战了传统的光激发近似概念，为理解光化学过程提供了新视角。

title: Linearly Polarized Light-Induced Anomalous Hall Effect and Topological Phase Transitions in an Altermagnetic Topological Insulator
summary: A recently identified class of collinear magnetic order, characterized by vanishing net magnetization yet unconventional spin splitting, known as altermagnets (AMs), has attracted significant research interest. Controlling the unconventional spin splitting and the associated band topology in AMs offers opportunities for realizing novel spin and topological transport phenomena. In this work, using Floquet engineering with periodically driven linearly polarized light (LPL), we explore light-induced control of an AM topological insulator. Remarkably, we find that AMs and conventional antiferromagnets (AFMs) exhibit distinct responses under LPL irradiation. Specifically, since LPL breaks neither time-reversal ($\mathcal{T}$) symmetry nor parity-time-reversal ($\mathcal{PT}$) symmetry, it is incapable of generating spin splitting or inducing an anomalous Hall effect (AHE) in conventional AFMs. In contrast, AMs intrinsically lack both $\mathcal{T}$ and $\mathcal{PT}$ symmetries. Their spin-up and spin-down bands are related by the combined symmetry of time reversal $\mathcal{T}$ and a crystal rotation. We show that LPL readily breaks these symmetries, thereby triggering a finite AHE exclusively in AMs. Furthermore, LPL can drive the AM topological insulator into a fully spin-polarized Chern insulating phase. Our findings not only provide a robust experimental scheme to distinguish AMs from conventional AFMs, but also establish a promising pathway toward dissipationless spintronic applications.

AI.tldr: 利用线性偏振光调控交变磁体拓扑绝缘体，实现反常霍尔效应和自旋极化的陈绝缘相
AI.motivation: 交变磁体具有独特的零净磁化但非传统自旋劈裂特性，控制其自旋劈裂和能带拓扑为实现新型自旋和拓扑输运现象提供了机会。需要探索交变磁体与常规反铁磁体在光调控下的不同响应。
AI.method: 采用Floquet工程方法，使用周期性驱动的线性偏振光调控交变磁体拓扑绝缘体。分析线性偏振光对时间反演对称性和宇称-时间反演对称性的影响。
AI.result: 线性偏振光在交变磁体中可诱导有限的反常霍尔效应，而在常规反铁磁体中则不能。线性偏振光还能将交变磁体拓扑绝缘体驱动到完全自旋极化的陈绝缘相。
AI.conclusion: 该研究不仅提供了区分交变磁体与常规反铁磁体的实验方案，还为无耗散自旋电子学应用建立了有前景的途径。

title: Unlocking extreme doping and strain in epitaxial monocrystalline silicon
summary: Hyperdoping, overcoming the solubility limit of dopants in a crystalline semiconductor, is a fertile method for the enhancement of the electrical, structural and optical devices' performances and for the exploration of exotic phases such as superconductivity. We demonstrate an unprecedented control on the dopant concentration and lattice deformation via nanosecond laser doping in epitaxial boron doped silicon, achieving record carrier concentrations (8 at.%) and lattice deformations (3 %). Probing the microscopical hyperdoping limitations, we show that the relevant mechanisms are caught by a simple combinatorial model, which quantitatively explains both the experimental carrier concentration and lattice deformation evolution. First principle calculations complete and support such simple model. Indeed, at the high doping levels now attainable, the maximum carrier concentration is inherently limited by the probability of two or three substitutional dopants occupying neighboring lattice sites, forming partially inactive complexes that we detail. This description is valid in the case of perfect layers with no crystallographic defects and a fully substitutional dopant occupation, highlighting the quality of the epitaxial layers realized.

AI.tldr: 通过纳秒激光掺杂在硼掺杂硅中实现超高掺杂浓度（8 at.%）和晶格变形（3%），建立了描述掺杂极限的组合模型
AI.motivation: 超掺杂技术可以突破半导体中掺杂剂的固溶度极限，从而增强器件的电学、结构和光学性能，并探索超导等奇异相。但需要更好地控制掺杂浓度和晶格变形，并理解微观掺杂极限机制。
AI.method: 采用纳秒激光掺杂技术在硼掺杂的外延硅中进行掺杂，实现了前所未有的掺杂浓度和晶格变形控制。通过简单的组合模型描述掺杂极限机制，并用第一性原理计算验证该模型。
AI.result: 实现了创纪录的载流子浓度（8 at.%）和晶格变形（3%）。发现高掺杂水平下，最大载流子浓度受限于两个或三个取代掺杂剂占据相邻晶格位置形成部分非活性复合物的概率。组合模型定量解释了实验观察到的载流子浓度和晶格变形演化。
AI.conclusion: 在无晶体缺陷和完全取代掺杂的理想外延层中，超掺杂的极限可以通过简单的组合模型描述，该模型揭示了高掺杂水平下掺杂剂形成非活性复合物的机制。研究展示了高质量外延层的实现和超掺杂的精确控制能力。

title: Quantum-corrected NMR crystallography at scale
summary: Structure determination by chemical-shift-driven NMR crystallography relies on comparing chemical shieldings measured in solid-state NMR experiments with simulations. However, computational cost limits the accuracy of shielding predictions, that usually rely on low-level electronic-structure approximations and neglect thermal and quantum mechanical nuclear motion, leading to large errors, especially for highly informative hydrogen-bonded protons. To address these limitations, we introduce a quantum-nuclei-corrected (QNC-NMR) approach. We generate inexpensively quantum ensembles using PET-MOLS, a novel machine-learning learning model of the interatomic potential transferable across molecular crystals. Using them as inputs to a chemical-shift model results in a two-fold improvement of the agreement with experiments for hydrogen-bonded protons, without the need for empirical corrections. The ability to sample structures consistent with the experimental conditions enables further refinement of the shielding model by finetuning it against measured shieldings. The favorable scaling with system size allows similar improvements for amorphous materials that are otherwise inaccessible to explicit DFT simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出QNC-NMR方法，结合机器学习势能模型和量子核校正，显著提升氢键质子化学位移预测精度，无需经验校正
AI.motivation: 传统NMR晶体学中化学位移预测受限于计算成本，通常使用低精度电子结构近似，忽略热和量子核运动，导致氢键质子预测误差大
AI.method: 开发QNC-NMR方法：1) 使用新型机器学习势能模型PET-MOLS生成量子系综；2) 将这些结构作为化学位移模型的输入；3) 通过实验测量值微调屏蔽模型
AI.result: 氢键质子化学位移预测与实验一致性提高两倍，无需经验校正；方法可扩展到非晶材料，而传统DFT模拟难以处理
AI.conclusion: QNC-NMR方法通过结合机器学习势能模型和量子核校正，显著提升了NMR晶体学中化学位移预测的准确性，特别适用于氢键系统和复杂材料

title: Altermagnets Enable Gate-Switchable Helical and Chiral Topological Transport with Spin-Valley-Momentum-Locked Dual Protection
summary: We establish a unified, symmetry-driven framework that combines the alternating spin splitting of altermagnets with valley topology to realize and electrically interconvert helical and chiral topological phases within a single material platform. We first demonstrate a magnetic analogue of the quantum spin Hall effect in altermagnets, hosting helical spin-valley-momentum-locked (SVML) edge states characterized by a composite spin-valley Chern number Csv = 2. Large-scale quantum transport simulations show these SVML edge states exhibit fully quantized spin conductance robust against nonmagnetic and long-range magnetic disorder, reflecting their dual topological protection, while remaining vulnerable to short-range magnetic disorder. Exploiting that the counterpropagating SVML modes are linked by crystal rotation symmetry, we introduce a gate-tunable sublattice-staggered potential that selectively gaps one valley and converts the helical state into a chiral quantum anomalous Hall phase with Csv = 1, robust against all disorder types. Reversing the potential switches the transmitted spin-valley polarization. Our first-principles calculations identify monolayer V2STeO and VO families as realistic platforms supporting both helical and chiral topological phases and their electrical switching. These results establish altermagnets as electrically programmable platforms for robust topological devices across charge, spin, and valley.

AI.tldr: 在反铁磁材料中建立对称性驱动框架，结合交替自旋劈裂和谷拓扑，实现螺旋和手性拓扑相的电控转换。
AI.motivation: 利用反铁磁材料的独特对称性，将交替自旋劈裂与谷拓扑相结合，在单一材料平台中实现可电控转换的拓扑相，为电荷、自旋和谷自由度的稳健拓扑器件提供可编程平台。
AI.method: 首先在反铁磁中实现量子自旋霍尔效应的磁性类比，产生螺旋自旋-谷-动量锁定边缘态；通过栅极可调的子晶格交错势选择性地打开一个谷的能隙，将螺旋态转换为手性量子反常霍尔相；通过第一性原理计算识别具体材料平台。
AI.result: 实现了复合自旋-谷陈数Csv=2的螺旋SVML边缘态，对非磁性和长程磁无序具有鲁棒性；通过电控成功转换为Csv=1的手性相，且能反转传输的自旋-谷极化；识别出单层V2STeO和VO家族作为实际材料平台。
AI.conclusion: 反铁磁材料可作为电可编程平台，支持螺旋和手性拓扑相及其电控转换，为电荷、自旋和谷自由度的稳健拓扑器件开辟了新途径。

title: Understanding the anisotropic response of $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ to ion implantation
summary: While $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ is considered a promising wide bandgap semiconductor, the impact of ion-induced defect formation and anisotropic elasticity remains poorly understood. Here, we combine a simulation and experiment X-ray diffraction (XRD) study of the strain-stress dynamics induced by ion implantation into $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ single-crystals with different surface orientations. The strain accumulation in the out-of-plane direction is observed by XRD to occur in an anisotropic manner, with compressive strain along the [010] direction and tensile strain along the directions perpendicular to (100) and (001). An anisotropic stress/strain accumulation model is proposed and probed via Molecular Dynamics (MD), showing an excellent agreement with the experiments. For higher damage levels, pole figures obtained both experimentally and by MD via a novel reciprocal-space projection method reveal an orientation-independent $β$-to-$γ$ phase transition, with a fixed crystallographic relationship between the polymorphs. By exploring the strain-stress dynamics in anisotropic systems, this work establishes a method to directly compare macroscale diffraction experiments and atomistic simulations and opens a new path to engineer the properties of such systems utilizing their anisotropic response to ion implantation/irradiation.

AI.tldr: 该研究结合模拟与实验XRD，揭示了β-Ga₂O₃中离子注入诱导的应变-应力各向异性行为，建立了宏观衍射实验与原子模拟的直接比较方法，并发现了β到γ相变。
AI.motivation: β-Ga₂O₃作为有前景的宽带隙半导体，其离子诱导缺陷形成和各向异性弹性的影响尚不清楚，需要深入理解离子注入过程中的应变-应力动力学。
AI.method: 结合模拟与实验XRD研究不同表面取向的β-Ga₂O₃单晶中离子注入诱导的应变-应力动力学，提出各向异性应力/应变积累模型，并通过分子动力学模拟验证。
AI.result: 观察到面外方向应变积累具有各向异性：[010]方向为压缩应变，(100)和(001)垂直方向为拉伸应变。在高损伤水平下，实验和MD均显示β到γ相变，具有固定的晶体学关系。
AI.conclusion: 通过探索各向异性系统中的应变-应力动力学，建立了宏观衍射实验与原子模拟直接比较的方法，为利用各向异性响应调控离子注入/辐照系统性能开辟了新途径。

title: Parity violation effects in helical osmocene: theoretical analysis and experimental prospects
summary: We present a computational investigation of the parity-violating (PV) contributions to the vibrational transitions and nuclear magnetic resonance shieldings of helical osmocene. A number of promising transitions within the spectral window of currently available sub-Hz metrology-grade lasers are identified, exhibiting high intensities and parity violation shifts of up to 7 Hz. We discuss the prospects for the synthesis of this compound and for subsequent ultra-precise mid-IR spectroscopy towards the first detection of parity violation in a chiral molecule.

AI.tldr: 研究螺旋二茂锇的宇称破缺效应对振动跃迁和核磁共振屏蔽的影响，识别出多个有前景的跃迁，宇称破缺位移高达7 Hz，有望首次在分子中检测宇称破缺。
AI.motivation: 首次在分子中检测宇称破缺效应是物理学和化学的重要目标。螺旋二茂锇作为手性分子，其振动跃迁和核磁共振性质可能表现出可观测的宇称破缺效应，为实验探测提供机会。
AI.method: 采用计算化学方法研究螺旋二茂锇的宇称破缺贡献。通过计算分析振动跃迁和核磁共振屏蔽，识别在当前亚赫兹级激光光谱窗口内具有高强度和显著宇称破缺位移的跃迁。
AI.result: 识别出多个有前景的振动跃迁，其宇称破缺位移高达7 Hz，且位于当前可用亚赫兹级激光的光谱窗口内。这些跃迁具有足够高的强度，适合进行超精密中红外光谱测量。
AI.conclusion: 螺旋二茂锇是检测分子宇称破缺效应的有前景候选者。该研究为合成该化合物并进行超精密中红外光谱测量提供了理论基础，有望实现首次在分子中检测宇称破缺效应。

title: Nanoscale Electronic Phase Separation Driven by Fe-site Ordering in Fe\textsubscript{5-x}GeTe\textsubscript{2}
summary: Understanding how local structural order governs electronic correlations is essential for revealing the microscopic mechanism underlying emergent behavior in two-dimensional magnets. In the layered van der Waals ferromagnet Fe\textsubscript{5-x}GeTe\textsubscript{2}, intrinsic Fe-site disorder provides a natural platform to probe this interplay. Here, we establish a direct atomic scale correlation between Fe-site ordering and local electronic structure by combining high-resolution scanning tunneling microscopy with density functional theory calculations. Scanning tunneling microscopy resolves two coexisting surface phases, a $\sqrt{3} \times \sqrt{3}$ superstructure associated with ordered Fe(1) configurations and an undistorted $1 \times 1$ hexagonal Te lattice in Fe(1)-deficient regions. Spatially resolved spectroscopy shows that the $\sqrt{3}$-ordered domains exhibit metallic behavior, whereas Fe(1) vacant areas display a suppressed density of states(DOS) near the Fermi level, indicative of pseudogapped electronic states. The nanoscale coexistence of these distinct electronic responses provides direct evidence of electronic phase separation driven by Fe-site ordering. First-principles calculations reveal that symmetry allowed hybridization between Fe 3d and Te 5p orbitals reconstructs the low-energy electronic structure, giving rise to the contrasting tunneling signatures of ordered and disordered phases. Bias-dependent local DOS simulations reproduce the experimentally observed contrast evolution and reveal that hybridization induced out of plane orbital character governs the spatial modulation of tunneling conductance. These results provide a microscopic framework linking atomic-scale structural order to nanoscale electronic inhomogeneity in van der Waals magnets.

AI.tldr: Fe5-xGeTe2中Fe位点有序与无序共存导致电子相分离：有序区域呈金属性，Fe(1)缺失区域呈现伪能隙电子态
AI.motivation: 研究二维磁体中局部结构有序如何调控电子关联，揭示微观机制。Fe5-xGeTe2中的本征Fe位点无序为探索这种相互作用提供了天然平台
AI.method: 结合高分辨扫描隧道显微镜(STM)和密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，建立Fe位点有序与局域电子结构的原子尺度关联
AI.result: 发现两种共存表面相：√3×√3超结构与有序Fe(1)构型相关，1×1六方Te晶格对应Fe(1)缺失区域。有序区域呈金属性，Fe(1)缺失区域显示费米能级附近态密度抑制的伪能隙态
AI.conclusion: Fe位点有序驱动的电子相分离提供了微观框架，将原子尺度结构有序与范德华磁体中的纳米尺度电子不均匀性联系起来。Fe 3d与Te 5p轨道杂化重构低能电子结构，产生有序和无序相的不同隧道特征

title: Giant orbital magnetoresistance in the antiferromagnet CoO driven by dynamic orbital angular momentum interaction
summary: Recent predictions of orders of magnitude larger orbital current effects compared to spin currents have attracted significant interest. However, the full potential of giant orbital currents remains to be fully harnessed, since so far, the orbital currents need to be converted into spin currents before they can interact with the static magnetization that is dominated by spin angular momentum in conventional magnets. By using a magnet dominated by orbital angular momentum, we demonstrate a more than fifty-fold enhancement in orbital Hall magnetoresistance in CoO/Cu*, compared to conventional CoO/Pt. This is found to be driven by a unique interaction between dynamic orbital angular momentum from surface oxidized Cu* (i.e., the orbital current) and the static orbital angular momentum which constitutes the magnetic moments in the antiferromagnetic insulator CoO. A distinctive scattering mechanism for orbital currents at the CoO interface leads to a sign reversal in orbital magnetoresistance in CoO/Cu* compared to CoO/Pt. Our results show how by using orbital angular momentum-dominated materials such as CoO, we can harness the benefits of giant orbital currents that have not been possible using conventional spin-dominated magnets, for orbitronics-based devices, offering unprecedented energy efficiency for operations of antiferromagnets that combine ultimate stability with THz dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了在轨道角动量主导的材料CoO中，通过轨道霍尔磁阻实现了超过50倍的增强，揭示了轨道电流与静态轨道角动量之间的独特相互作用机制。
AI.motivation: 轨道电流效应比自旋电流效应大几个数量级，但传统磁体中轨道电流需要先转换为自旋电流才能与自旋主导的静态磁化相互作用，限制了其潜力。研究旨在利用轨道角动量主导的材料直接利用轨道电流。
AI.method: 使用轨道角动量主导的反铁磁绝缘体CoO与表面氧化的Cu*（Cu*）组成异质结构，与传统的CoO/Pt结构对比，研究轨道霍尔磁阻效应和轨道电流的散射机制。
AI.result: CoO/Cu*结构中的轨道霍尔磁阻比CoO/Pt增强了50多倍，发现了轨道电流与CoO中静态轨道角动量之间的独特相互作用，以及在CoO界面处轨道电流的独特散射机制导致磁阻符号反转。
AI.conclusion: 通过使用轨道角动量主导的材料如CoO，可以直接利用巨大的轨道电流效应，为基于轨道电子学的器件提供了前所未有的能量效率，结合了反铁磁体的终极稳定性和太赫兹动力学特性。

title: Real-time exciton dynamics in two-dimensional materials under ultrashort laser pulses
summary: The optical response of two-dimensional materials is often significantly impacted by excitonic effects due to the reduced screening of attractive Coulomb interactions in low-dimensional systems. Accurate modeling of exciton formation and real-time dynamics is essential to understanding their ultrafast optical properties. In this study, we theoretically investigate the exciton dynamics in a two-dimensional hexagonal boron nitride (h-BN) and a germanium sulfide (GeS) monolayers exposed to an ultrashort laser pulse. We analyze the system's response to the external field in one- and two-photon excitation regimes. For our calculations, we combine a state-of-the-art ab initio approach to study exciton dynamics with a highly precise numerical scheme. We incorporate electron-hole interactions through a non-local self-energy operator derived from the many-body perturbation theory (MBPT) within the time-dependent adiabatic $GW$ (TD-a$GW$) approximation. We implement this approach using the full-electron LAPW+lo method in the all-electron exciting package. Our results elucidate the role of many-body effects in shaping ultrafast excitonic processes in two-dimensional materials, contributing to the fundamental understanding necessary for optoelectronic and photonic applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究结合先进的第一性原理方法和精确数值方案，理论研究了二维h-BN和GeS单层材料在超短激光脉冲下的激子动力学，揭示了多体效应对二维材料超快激子过程的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 二维材料中由于库仑相互作用屏蔽减弱，激子效应显著影响光学响应。准确模拟激子形成和实时动力学对于理解其超快光学性质至关重要，这对光电子和光子学应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 结合先进的第一性原理方法和精确数值方案，采用基于多体微扰理论的时间相关绝热GW近似，通过非局域自能算符包含电子-空穴相互作用，使用全电子LAPW+lo方法在exciting软件包中实现。
AI.result: 研究了二维h-BN和GeS单层材料在单光子和双光子激发机制下的系统响应，阐明了多体效应对二维材料超快激子过程形成的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解二维材料中超快激子动力学提供了理论基础，揭示了多体效应的重要作用，对光电子和光子学应用具有重要价值。

title: Revisiting the symmetry and optical phonons of altermagnetic $α$-MnTe
summary: Using infrared (IR) and Raman spectroscopies combined with high-resolution x-ray diffraction, we address several controversial aspects of altermagnetic $α$-MnTe. We show that mechanical stress applied to crystals of this material causes a drastic broadening of Bragg peaks that conceals signatures of additional phases present in the sample. Indeed, spatially resolved Raman spectroscopy reveals that the modes around 175 cm$^{-1}$ often reported in $α$-MnTe are not reproducible across different positions and samples and originate from the secondary phase of MnTe$_2$. By combining spectroscopic probes with ab initio calculations, we establish the IR-active optical phonon of $α$-MnTe around 155 cm$^{-1}$ ($E_{1u}$) and the Raman-active optical phonon around 100 cm$^{-1}$ ($E_{2g}$) at room temperature. Two intense Raman modes around 120 and 140 cm$^{-1}$ are shown to be intrinsic, even though they can not be assigned to $Γ$-point optical phonons. These modes couple to magnetic order in $α$-MnTe and also to the transient reflectivity resulting in coherent oscillations. Both 6-fold rotation symmetry and inversion symmetry are preserved in $α$-MnTe within our experimental resolution.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过红外、拉曼光谱和高分辨率X射线衍射，澄清了α-MnTe中争议性的光谱特征，发现175 cm⁻¹附近的拉曼峰来自MnTe₂杂质相，确定了α-MnTe的本征光学声子模式，并揭示了120和140 cm⁻¹附近的本征拉曼模式与磁序的耦合。
AI.motivation: α-MnTe作为一种反铁磁材料，其光谱特征存在争议，特别是175 cm⁻¹附近的拉曼峰来源不明，需要澄清哪些光谱特征是本征的，哪些来自杂质相。
AI.method: 结合红外光谱、拉曼光谱和高分辨率X射线衍射，配合空间分辨拉曼光谱和第一性原理计算，系统分析α-MnTe的光谱特征。
AI.result: 1) 机械应力导致布拉格峰展宽，掩盖了样品中的杂质相；2) 175 cm⁻¹附近的拉曼峰来自MnTe₂杂质相，非α-MnTe本征；3) 确定了α-MnTe的本征红外活性光学声子(155 cm⁻¹, E₁ᵤ)和拉曼活性光学声子(100 cm⁻¹, E₂g)；4) 发现120和140 cm⁻¹附近的本征拉曼模式与磁序耦合；5) 确认α-MnTe保持6重旋转对称性和反演对称性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究澄清了α-MnTe光谱特征的争议，区分了本征模式和杂质相贡献，为理解这种反铁磁材料的光学性质提供了可靠基础，并揭示了其拉曼模式与磁序的耦合关系。

title: Structural Commonalities in Different Classes of Non-Crystalline Materials
summary: In the past decades, the research community has explored diverse structures and new fabrication methods of non-crystalline solids. Glassy materials that belong to the semiconductor realm and to the metallic type are the most studied both experimentally and theoretically. The present work investigates similar structural trends whenever they exist and different trends among different classes. Amorphous semiconductors display Pair Distribution Functions (PDF) that are very similar among themselves, and this indicates that these network-forming materials have properties that are alike. Analogously, metallic systems have comparable PDFs but different from the network forming materials, as it should be, since the properties between these two classes are quite different. Here we pay attention to the first and second peaks of their structures. Whereas the semiconductor structures display a simple first and second peak with a near-zero value between them. In contrast, the metallic systems have a very well-defined non-zero value between the first and second peaks, and they also display what we have come to identify as an 'elephant peak'. We also discuss semimetals and alloys.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了非晶半导体和金属玻璃的结构特征，发现两类材料在径向分布函数上表现出明显不同的峰形特征，半导体材料的第一和第二峰之间接近零值，而金属系统则有明显的非零值并存在"象峰"特征。
AI.motivation: 过去几十年，研究界探索了非晶固体的多样结构和新型制备方法。玻璃态材料中，半导体类和金属类是实验和理论研究最多的。本研究旨在探索不同类别材料之间的结构趋势异同，特别是半导体和金属玻璃的结构特征差异。
AI.method: 通过分析不同类别非晶材料的径向分布函数（PDF），重点关注第一和第二峰的结构特征。比较半导体网络形成材料和金属系统的PDF模式差异，并讨论半金属和合金的情况。
AI.result: 研究发现半导体材料的PDF非常相似，表明这些网络形成材料具有相似性质；金属系统的PDF也彼此相似但与半导体不同。具体差异在于：半导体结构的第一和第二峰之间接近零值，而金属系统在第一和第二峰之间有明显的非零值，并表现出被称为"象峰"的特征。
AI.conclusion: 不同类别的非晶材料（半导体和金属）在结构特征上表现出系统性差异，这些差异反映了它们不同的物理性质。半导体网络形成材料和金属玻璃在径向分布函数的第一和第二峰特征上存在明显区别，这为理解不同类别非晶材料的结构-性能关系提供了重要线索。

title: Epitaxial stabilization of magnetic GdAuSb/LaAuSb superlattices
summary: We report the epitaxial stabilization of GdAuSb films and GdAuSb/LaAuSb superlattices via molecular beam epitaxy on (0001)-oriented Al$_{2}$O$_{3}$ substrates. GdAuSb crystallize in the Au-Au dimerized YPtAs structure type (space group $P6_{3}/mmc$), the same structure as the Dirac semimetal LaAuSb. Angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) measurements show similar near $E_F$ bandstructures for GdAuSb and LaAuSb, plus a rigid band shift for GdAuSb towards more hole-like behavior and core-like Gd $4f$ states $\sim 9$~eV below the Fermi energy. LaAuSb/GdAuSb superlattices exhibit sharp superlattice fringes by X-ray diffraction and atomically-precise interfaces by scanning transmission electron microscopy. Superlattices display two transitions in temperature-dependent resistvity, compared to a single Néel temperature for thick GdAuSb films. Superlattices of $Ln$AuSb materials ($Ln=$ rare earth) with atomically abrupt interfaces offer a new epitaxial platform for control of magnetic and topological order via tunable intralayer exchange and reduced dimensionality.

AI.tldr: 通过分子束外延在Al2O3衬底上实现了GdAuSb薄膜和GdAuSb/LaAuSb超晶格的稳定生长，为调控磁性和拓扑序提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 开发一种新的外延平台，用于通过可调控的层内交换和降低维度来控制磁性材料和拓扑材料的性质，特别是稀土基AuSb材料体系。
AI.method: 使用分子束外延在(0001)取向的Al2O3衬底上生长GdAuSb薄膜和GdAuSb/LaAuSb超晶格；通过X射线衍射、扫描透射电子显微镜和角分辨光电子能谱进行结构表征；测量温度依赖的电阻率来研究磁性转变。
AI.result: 成功稳定了GdAuSb薄膜和超晶格，GdAuSb具有与狄拉克半金属LaAuSb相同的晶体结构；超晶格显示出尖锐的超晶格条纹和原子级锐利的界面；超晶格在电阻率中显示出两个转变温度，而厚GdAuSb薄膜只有一个奈尔温度。
AI.conclusion: 具有原子级锐利界面的LnAuSb超晶格为通过可调控的层内交换和降低维度来控制磁性和拓扑序提供了一个新的外延平台。

title: Predicting Atomistic Transitions with Transformers
comment: Presented at the 2025 Conference on Data Analysis (CoDA), February 25-28, Santa Fe, New Mexico
summary: Accurate knowledge of the atomistic transition pathways in materials and material surfaces is crucial for many material science problems. However, conventional simulation techniques used to find these transitions are extremely computationally intensive. Even with large-scale, accelerated material simulations, the computational cost constrains the applicable domain in practice. Machine learning models, with the potential to learn the complex emergent behaviors governing atomistic transitions as a fast surrogate model, have great promise to predict transitions with a vastly reduced computational cost. Here, we demonstrate how transformers can be trained to predict atomistic transitions in nano-clusters. We show how we evaluate physical validity of the predictions and how a multitude of additional, different microstates can be generated by slightly varying the data provided to the model.

AI.tldr: 使用Transformer模型预测纳米团簇的原子级转变路径，大幅降低传统模拟的计算成本
AI.motivation: 材料科学中原子级转变路径的准确了解至关重要，但传统模拟技术计算成本极高，限制了实际应用范围。机器学习模型有望作为快速替代模型学习原子转变的复杂涌现行为。
AI.method: 训练Transformer模型来预测纳米团簇中的原子级转变，评估预测结果的物理有效性，并通过微调输入数据生成多种不同的微观状态。
AI.result: 展示了Transformer模型在预测原子级转变方面的潜力，能够以显著降低的计算成本生成有效的预测结果。
AI.conclusion: Transformer模型在预测原子级转变方面具有巨大潜力，能够大幅减少计算成本，为材料科学中的转变路径研究提供高效解决方案。

title: Deterministic Electrical Switching in Altermagnets via Surface Antisymmetry Groups
summary: A surface antisymmetry group framework is developed to establish design rules for deterministic electrical switching of the Néel vector in a film of a collinear bipartite antiferromagnet. In centrosymmetric $d$-wave altermagnets, where current-induced torques vanish in the bulk, staggered effective fields can nevertheless exist as an interfacial response, whose allowed tensor form is determined by the surface antisymmetry subgroup for the given surface orientation. Separately, the structure of the spin conductivity tensor determines which surface orientations allow transverse spin current generation via the spin-splitter effect. Taken together, these symmetry-enforced properties establish which surface orientations of $d$-wave altermagnets can serve as deterministically switchable spin current sources in spin-torque heterostructures. Because the design rules are based solely on the surface antisymmetry point group, the required staggered axial response is robust against averaging over symmetry-equivalent surface facets and equilibrium roughness.

AI.tldr: 提出表面反对称群框架，为共线双分反铁磁薄膜中奈尔矢量的确定性电开关建立设计规则，特别针对d波交变磁体
AI.motivation: 在中心对称d波交变磁体中，体电流诱导力矩消失，但界面响应仍可产生交错有效场。需要建立基于对称性的设计规则，确定哪些表面取向能实现确定性开关和横向自旋电流生成
AI.method: 开发表面反对称群框架，分析表面取向对应的反对称子群，确定允许的张量形式。结合自旋电导张量结构，识别能通过自旋分裂效应产生横向自旋电流的表面取向
AI.result: 建立了基于表面反对称点群的设计规则，确定了d波交变磁体中能作为确定性可开关自旋电流源的表面取向。该交错轴向响应在对称等价表面刻面和平衡粗糙度平均下具有鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 表面反对称群框架为自旋转矩异质结构中确定性可开关自旋电流源的设计提供了普适的对称性指导，特别适用于d波交变磁体系统
